_comment: AC-7 mutation audit — a NIGHTLY ALARM, never a merge gate. Judges the acceptance-test holdout (tests/acceptance/ only) by mutating src/ and checking the acceptance tests catch the mutants. Run via .github/workflows/mutation-nightly.yml; the JSON report is post-processed by scripts/mutation-report.mjs into a per-AC score. NestJS jest is CommonJS (ts-jest, no ESM preset), so no --experimental-vm-modules node arg is needed here (unlike the Express template). main.ts (bootstrap) and *.module.ts (pure DI wiring) are excluded — mutating them yields low-signal mutants.
